summary.one_liner: Analyzed 89 written reviews from the App Store spread across 5 Countries.

quotes.author: jv4
quotes.text: I love being able to quickly find recipes, but even better is quickly searching by ingredient. For example, right now I have an open jar of chilies in adobo sauce to use up. I was able to instantly find quite a few recipes from my collection that use that ingredient.
quotes.excerpt: I love being able to quickly find recipes, but even better is quickly searching by ingredient. For example, right now I have an open jar of chilies in adobo sauce to use up. I…

quotes.author: AlabamaSweetHome
quotes.text: I also love that you can check the ingredients of a recipe while you are at the grocery store, just in case you forgot something or want to pursue a new idea.
quotes.excerpt: I also love that you can check the ingredients of a recipe while you are at the grocery store, just in case you forgot something or want to pursue a new idea.

quotes.author: osucristina
quotes.text: This is amazing. It's like searching a recipe app but if your own cookbooks. Sure, you could flip though a bunch of books and find a recipe you want to make but why do that when you can search the app for "ground turkey" and it will pull up every recipe from your cookbooks that use that ingredient.
quotes.excerpt: This is amazing. It's like searching a recipe app but if your own cookbooks. Sure, you could flip though a bunch of books and find a recipe you want to make but why do that when…

quotes.author: WyndleCook
quotes.text: I love that I can search across all of my books for a single ingredient and see reviews of recipes from other cooks.
quotes.excerpt: I love that I can search across all of my books for a single ingredient and see reviews of recipes from other cooks.

quotes.author: Wobbly2025
quotes.text: But with CookShelf on my phone, I was able to look up recipes using what was available.
quotes.excerpt: But with CookShelf on my phone, I was able to look up recipes using what was available.

quotes.text: I can digitally search for recipes across my collections.
quotes.excerpt: I can digitally search for recipes across my collections.

quotes.text: We love how we can search by ingredients.
quotes.excerpt: We love how we can search by ingredients.

quotes.author: plumberful
quotes.text: Being able to search by ingredients is a game-changer and I also find it very helpful to quickly search for specific recipes from specific books.
quotes.excerpt: Being able to search by ingredients is a game-changer and I also find it very helpful to quickly search for specific recipes from specific books.

quotes.author: ConcerningAda
quotes.text: I've long struggled with a way to effectively search my cookery book collection, so this is a game changer.
quotes.excerpt: I've long struggled with a way to effectively search my cookery book collection, so this is a game changer.

quotes.text: I can search for an ingredient I have and see what recipes I can make.
quotes.excerpt: I can search for an ingredient I have and see what recipes I can make.

quotes.text: Now I search whatever meat I have and try new recipes from books I hadn't opened in awhile or really got to test out.
quotes.excerpt: Now I search whatever meat I have and try new recipes from books I hadn't opened in awhile or really got to test out.

quotes.author: TabithaYogi
quotes.text: I finally have a way to search across all of them.

quotes.author: SW_DC_Gal
quotes.text: My favorite feature is the ingredient list that it gives for recipes I am searching. That helps immensely with determining whether I can make something-do I have the ingredients or pantry staples or will it require a trip to the market?
quotes.excerpt: My favorite feature is the ingredient list that it gives for recipes I am searching. That helps immensely with determining whether I can make something-do I have the ingredients…

quotes.author: Boopitypoo
quotes.text: The app, in its first iteration, is lovely and visual and makes it easy to search through my cookbooks.
quotes.excerpt: The app, in its first iteration, is lovely and visual and makes it easy to search through my cookbooks.

quotes.author: jsufnek
quotes.text:
AMAZING!!

Finally!!! My friends and I have always talked about how much we would like to see all our cookbook and magazine recipes in one place, and this app does it! It’s so quick to setup and so intuitive to use. I am so happy to have this in my cooking toolbox now 😊
quotes.excerpt: AMAZING!! Finally!!! My friends and I have always talked about how much we would like to see all our cookbook and magazine recipes in one place, and this app does it! It’s so…

quotes.author: Strangertaste
quotes.text: Have a bunch of cannellini beans on hand? No problem. Scroll through every recipe for them in every cookbook you own. Love that the app quickly shows the other ingredients needed, and gives you the page number to reference.
quotes.excerpt: Have a bunch of cannellini beans on hand? No problem. Scroll through every recipe for them in every cookbook you own. Love that the app quickly shows the other ingredients…

quotes.author: TOTCOOKS
quotes.text: Whenever you want to make something but can't remember what recipes are where you just list an ingredient you have and search all your cookbooks to find recipes.
quotes.excerpt: Whenever you want to make something but can't remember what recipes are where you just list an ingredient you have and search all your cookbooks to find recipes.

quotes.author: Lcb072818
quotes.text: It's nice to be able to just look up an ingredient or dish in the app and know which of my cookbooks have the recipes I need.
quotes.excerpt: It's nice to be able to just look up an ingredient or dish in the app and know which of my cookbooks have the recipes I need.

quotes.author: Amberspring
quotes.text: I could not like this app more. I strive to make more recipes from my cookbooks but often end up searching online for ideas from outside the market. This app helps me find the recipes I know I'll like.
quotes.excerpt: I could not like this app more. I strive to make more recipes from my cookbooks but often end up searching online for ideas from outside the market. This app helps me find the…

quotes.author: NerdAlert808
quotes.text: I've been using Eat Your Books for years to search my cookbooks but the website is very slow and you have to log in every time you use it. This app gives me the same information but is much faster.
quotes.excerpt: I've been using Eat Your Books for years to search my cookbooks but the website is very slow and you have to log in every time you use it. This app gives me the same information…

quotes.author: Untidy me
quotes.text: I've spent a couple of hours scanning my cookery books ( 88 ) a few had to be searched for by name rather than scanning but I suspect that's my phone problem and not app and even so it was super easy to do. I was surprised so many of them were there as some were old and very random. … I've already committed to making 50 recipes ( you'd think someone with 88 cookbooks could manage more but here we are ) and have high hopes that my cookery book reading will actually turn into cooking.
quotes.excerpt: I've spent a couple of hours scanning my cookery books ( 88 ) a few had to be searched for by name rather than scanning but I suspect that's my phone problem and not app and even…

quotes.text: But if you've bought a number of cookbooks over the years and you've added them to the Eat your Books site, this app makes it really easy to search. … For a relatively small cost, you can restore the usefulness of those cookbooks that you bought over the years. Rediscoveries await.
quotes.excerpt: But if you've bought a number of cookbooks over the years and you've added them to the Eat your Books site, this app makes it really easy to search. … For a relatively small…

quotes.excerpt: I absolutely love cookbooks. Buts it's been really hard to use mine because it's been impossible to search across my collection and know what good and what not. Until now! … Now…

quotes.author: Edit Faris
quotes.text:
Very disappointed

I was so looking forward to upload my favorite books and use the recipes from my phone or tablet. There are no measurements/ingredient amounts showing in the recipes and it admittedly could leave out ingredients. The recipes direct you back to the cookbook. With upgrades, this is a great idea but without the full recipes, it’s not practical at all.

pain_points.title: No full recipe in the app

quotes.author: jv4

quotes.author: CG233

takeaways: Average rating is below 4★ — prioritize fixing the highest-volume complaints.
Lead with your strongest praise themes in marketing and onboarding.
Address top pain points explicitly — many come from mismatched expectations.
Show review count and data sources so buyers trust the sample size.
